title: pinus luchuensis subsp. hwangshanensis
intro: Pinus luchuensis subsp. hwangshanensis, also known as Hwangshan pine, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pinus luchuensis subsp. hwangshanensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving respiratory health. In herbal preparations, it is often used as an essential oil or in the form of pine needles, which can be infused in hot water or used as a tea to leverage its medicinal properties.
